PRORROGA_CIERRE_MODULO.TITLE: Commission Management
PRORROGA_CIERRE_MODULO.SUBTITLE: Select the type of process you want to perform.
PRORROGA_CIERRE_MODULO.SOLICITUD_PRORROGA_DESC: Allows requesting an extension of the study commission period.
PRORROGA_CIERRE_MODULO.SOLICITUD_CIERRE_DESC: Allows managing the formal closure of the commission.
PRORROGA_CIERRE_MODULO.SOLO_DOCENTES_TITLE: Module available only for Faculty Members
PRORROGA_CIERRE_MODULO.SOLO_DOCENTES_MSG: Commission extension and closure requests can only be managed by users with the Faculty Member role.

CIERRE_COMISION.TITLE: Commission Closure Request
CIERRE_COMISION.VALIDANDO: Checking availability to create a closure request...
CIERRE_COMISION.CREAR_DESC: The closure request must be submitted once the Study Commission has been successfully completed. This request will initially be sent to the Faculty Dean for review and validation. Afterwards, it will continue through the institutional workflow established for the formal closure process.
CIERRE_COMISION.SOLICITUD_UNICA_DESC: Once the request is created, it will be sent for review and you will not be able to create another closure request while one remains under review or approved.
CIERRE_COMISION.GESTION_DESC: You currently have a closure request that has already been created and is under review.
CIERRE_COMISION.PROCESO_DESC: Your request is currently being reviewed by the corresponding authorities. While it remains under review or approved, it will not be possible to register a new closure request.

PRORROGA_SEGUIMIENTO.SOLICITUD_EN_GESTION: You currently have an extension request under review.
